title: Benigamer's enhanced visuals
description: This pack adds custom fog and changes sky and grass colors for every biome and ads cool particle effects
body:
![requires Polytone mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74cedb1236603fbeb359c9fa1d601446f4014261.webp)[Polytone mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)

This texture pack adds:
- biome dependent sky and fog colors 
- many new particles
- new grass colors
- and more
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/w5Iro2mJ-io" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


recommended settings:
20 chunks render distance
